name: Cinnamon S'mores Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a square pan, measuring 9 x 9 x 2 inches. In a microwave-safe casserole dish, mix the chocolate chips, corn syrup, margarine (or butter), vanilla, and cinnamon. Cover tightly and microwave on high for 2 to 3 minutes or until boiling; stir.
2. Once melted, add the honey graham cereal and fold in the miniature marshmallows until everything is completely coated with chocolate. Press the mixture evenly into the prepared pan using the back of a spoon. Allow to set for about 1 hour, or until cool.
3. Cut into approximately 2-inch squares. Yield: 18 squares; Calories per square: 110.
